objects.name: Analytic 1841
objects.description: The defender correlates supervised-device app posture and lifecycle context with repeated local file or local-database access effects, especially when a managed app reads browser, messaging, keychain-adjacent, or application-container data outside its expected role and then stages or uploads the result. Because direct low-level local system access visibility is weaker on iOS, the primary analytic is effect-based: managed app identity, file/database access where visible to the mobile sensor, background execution context, and near-term outbound communication.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Supervised managed app without expected local export, sync, or forensic role accesses or stages local records inconsistent with policy baseline

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application performs repeated record access, container traversal, or local data extraction processing against local stores before staging or transmission

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application reads multiple local container files, browser-history artifacts, messaging artifacts, or local records in rapid sequence during the collection phase

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window between managed app posture, local access activity, optional staging, and upload
Managed apps expected to access local records such as enterprise sync, backup, or approved investigation tools
Expected app-container or local artifact locations for legitimate workflows
Whether local record access should happen only during active user interaction
Minimum number of local file or record reads in a short interval required for alerting
Environment-specific list of high-value browser, messaging, token, or local record artifacts
Minimum outbound volume consistent with recent local data collection
